name: Daylight
overview: Gece's dreams are put on hold when she moves to Foça to support her special needs sister. There, she meets Özgür, a sailing instructor caring for his brother with Asperger's Syndrome. As Gece learns from Özgür and embraces maturity, her relationship with her boyfriend Emir faces challenges. She must choose between pursuing true love or staying committed to her previous life.
